name: Simon Vale's Office
description: A soundproofed director's office with a self-locking door, glass display shelves, and a heavy bronze brain model on a side plinth.
publicNotes: Initial presumed crime scene. Door locked from inside at discovery.

name: Service Corridor C
description: A narrow service route between the east gallery, freight access, and temporary exhibit storage.
publicNotes: Staff route used during the gala to move equipment away from donor traffic.

name: Grand Atrium
description: The gala's public stage and donor reception area.
publicNotes: Multiple speeches and donor appearances were recorded here.

name: East Gallery
description: Interactive exhibition space used for demonstrations during the gala.
publicNotes: Daniel Kwon led a demonstration here during the key window.

name: Loading Dock
description: Freight entrance used by fabricators, caterers, and event staff.
publicNotes: Noah Reed's crew staged equipment here.

name: Glass Elevator
description: A visible elevator overlooking the atrium.
publicNotes: A mechanical stall briefly trapped Jonah Vale.

name: Security Control Room
description: Camera monitoring station run by security staff.
publicNotes: Owen Pike monitored access alerts from this room.

name: Dual-Access Laboratory
description: A secured lab that requires two credentialed people to enter or exit.
publicNotes: Used for ethics demonstrations and locked sample cabinets.

name: South Plaza
description: Outdoor plaza where protesters and press gathered outside the gala entrance.
publicNotes: Mira Sol was documented here during the fatal window.

name: Corridor Storage Alcove
description: A shallow locked alcove beside Service Corridor C, used for temporary event supplies and exhibit tools.
publicNotes: Access is logged by staff lanyard.

name: Donor Lounge
description: Private sponsor reception room near the atrium.
publicNotes: Several messages claimed Simon was needed here.

name: Institute Medical Suite
description: Small clinic space used for guest emergencies and research screenings.
publicNotes: Emergency physician Sophie Park was a gala guest, not assigned staff.
